items.title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
items.dek: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.
items.body: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ticketmaster-owner Live Nation overcharged fans as illegal monopoly, jury finds
items.dek: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.body: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: After Real Madrid's UCL comeback falls short, can their project be salvaged?
items.dek: Big questions lie ahead for Real Madrid following their defeat to Bayern Munich in an instant Champions League classic.
items.body: Big questions lie ahead for Real Madrid following their defeat to Bayern Munich in an instant Champions League classic.
